case_number: constitutional jurisdiction of this Court. No case

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3418 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA No.13869/2022. 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on MA No.13870/2022. 4. For hearing of main case. 16-11-2022 Mr. Abdul Jabbar Charran advocate for petitioner. Petitioner has been issued a notice dated 06.10.2022 for removal of encroachment and has been called upon to appear before Mukhtiarkar & City Survey Officer Taluka City Hyderabad on 27.10.2022 at 11.00 a.m. along with all relevant record. Petitioner instead of appearing before the officer concerned and showing him the relevant documents allowing him to occupy the land/house has challenged the same in the constitutional jurisdiction of this Court. No case for indulgence is made out and accordingly this petition is dismissed in limine along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
